visa_type_detail.name: work visa
visa_type_detail.description: If you’re planning to work in New Zealand and you’re not a citizen or permanent resident of NZ or Australia, you’ll need a visa that lets you work.

visa_type_detail.name: work visas that can lead to residence
visa_type_detail.description: Some work visas can also lead to residence — that is, the right to live, study and work here without needing to leave by a certain date. To apply you need to have skills, experience and qualifications that are needed for the New Zealand workforce.

visa_type_detail.name: working holiday visa
visa_type_detail.description: You do not need a RealMe ® account if you’re applying for a working holiday visa.
